name: slop-simulator
description: Parody AI-slop SaaS site + Jira-clone demo, served by a single Go server.

scripts.dev: PORT=${PORT:-8080} concurrently -n vite,go -c cyan,green "bun --cwd web run dev" "air"
scripts.test:go: go test $(go list ./... | grep -v /node_modules/) -race -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic && bash scripts/check-coverage.sh coverage.out
